case_title: SALVADOR CRISTALES ET AL VS. REGINA LYNN BERRIGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-29-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-18-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-29-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRISTALES, SALVADOR CRISTALES, JOSEFA AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIGAN, REGINA LYNN DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-30-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-08-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-18-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200019251)
